key_items: Bitcoin plunges below $62,000 with $792M in liquidations as short-term holder stress peaks
Mt. Gox moves $739M in BTC while market under stress, triggering fear of capitulation selling
Treasury Secretary Bessent signals progress on strategic Bitcoin reserve and CLARITY Act passage
reasoning: Bitcoin is in acute downward pressure with technical breakdown below critical support levels ($65K-$66K), massive liquidations cascading through leveraged positions, and Mt. Gox wallet movements adding seller uncertainty at a vulnerable moment. Counterbalancing bullish regulatory catalysts (strategic reserve, CLARITY Act progress, Revolut stablecoins, Mastercard integration) are being overwhelmed by immediate selling pressure and $60K becoming the next critical battleground in a market rotting toward capitulation.
risks: Cascade liquidations accelerating below $60K could trigger panic selling that rapidly tests $50K support as short-term holders reach maximum stress levels and forced unwinding spreads through derivatives markets.
